title: centaurea euxina
intro: Centaurea euxina, also known as the Balkan cornflower or mountain cornflower, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea euxina are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
